inputs.text: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles

inputs.prompt:
scene: Static studio portrait against a pure white seamless background, clean studio lighting, evenly lit like a passport or corporate headshot

character: Blonde woman wearing a light blue button-up shirt with a small lavalier microphone clipped to the collar

action: The woman faces the camera and speaks directly to the viewer. Only her lips animate for speech. The rest of her face and head remain visually frozen like a still photograph. Expression is neutral and unchanged.

camera: Locked tripod camera, centered tight close-up framing on the face, perfectly still frame, no camera motion, no zoom, no focus change

motion: Lips move naturally for speech. The head is rigidly fixed in position with no vertical or horizontal shift. The face remains perfectly centered in the frame at all times, with no upward drift, no downward movement, and no change in alignment. No parallax or perspective change. Eyes remain fixed, no blinking. Hair, shoulders, and clothing are completely static with no physics.

background: Plain white background that stays perfectly static with no lighting or shadow changes

style: Still photograph with isolated lip animation, face locked like a freeze-frame, minimal animation, high stability, interview test recording

nodes.title: About Size
widgets_values:
Width & height settings must be divisible by 32 + 1. 
Frame count must be divisible by 8 + 1. 


Running with invalid parameters **will not cause errors**. Instead, the flow will silently choose the closest valid parameters. 

By default, we are using 720p resolution. You can try 1920*1088 if you have a powerful GPU.
